testcase.name: Admin Page Debug Session Investigation › capture debug panel information on admin page
testcase.system-out:
Step 1: Navigating to admin page directly... Current URL after navigation: https://localhost:3002/login?callbackUrl=https%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3002%2Fadmin ISSUE DETECTED: Redirected to login page - session not detected! Attempting to login with test credentials... Navigating to admin page after login... Waiting for debug panel to appear...
Screenshots saved to ./screenshots/ directory Review the screenshots to analyze session data discrepancies
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results/admin-debug-flow-Admin-Pag-749b3-l-information-on-admin-page-chromium/test-finished-1.png]]
testcase.system-err:
